prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次依次为约 6650→5955→7561→7989→5001 名。2021–2024 年整体呈后移趋势（从 6650 后移至 7989），但 2025 年新高考首年（物理类）位次大幅前移至 5001 名，较 2024 年提前约 2988 名，波动显著。近 3 年（2023–2025）位次从 7561 前移至 5001，累计前移约 2560 名；该校在山西省理科（含物理类）招生计划：2021 年 138 人→2022 年 127 人→2023 年 123 人→2024 年 125 人→2025 年 130 人→2026 年113 人。2026 年较 2025 年缩招 17 人（-13.1%），缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解，位次有前移动力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京理工大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在 33–38 名区间，2026 年最新排名第 36 名，属全国顶尖理工类高校，层次稳固；该校声誉评价近年以中性/混合为主，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第 65，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评 A+，光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程获评 A-。这些优势学科与该校在山西招生的电子信息类、自动化类、机械类、兵器类等专业高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024–2026 年持续处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"状态，热度稳定；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 3.4%，考生规模小幅下降，竞争略有缓解；省控线方面，2025 年山西物理类本科批 419 分，较此前理科一批线有所下降，但属新高考模式切换的正常调整；南京理工大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对山西考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在山西招生人数占全国总招生比例约 4.7%（2025 年数据），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移的基准、2026 年缩招 13.1% 带来的位次前移动力、学校排名小幅提升及优势学科吸引力，以及物理类考生总数小幅下降等因素，预计 2026 年位次在 2025 年基准 5001 名基础上继续前移，但缩招幅度较大使前移空间有限，且专业热度持续高位对位次有支撑作用。预测最低位次约 4629 名，区间 4129–5129 名。

- 自动化类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including Physics Category) were approximately 6650→5955→7561→7989→5001. From 2021 to 2024, the overall trend was a backward shift (from 6650 to 7989), but in 2025, the first year of the new Gaokao (Physics Category), the ranking moved significantly forward to 5001, about 2988 places ahead of 2024, showing notable fluctuation. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), the ranking moved from 7561 to 5001, a cumulative forward shift of about 2560 places. The enrollment plan for science (including Physics Category) in Shanxi Province: 2021: 138 students → 2022: 127 → 2023: 123 → 2024: 125 → 2025: 130 → 2026: 113. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a reduction of 17 students (-13.1%), a relatively large reduction, which theoretically eases competition slightly and provides momentum for the ranking to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been stable in the 33–38 range in recent years, with the latest 2026 ranking at 36th, placing it among the top science and engineering universities in China, with a solid level. Its reputation evaluation has been mainly neutral/mixed in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 65th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no abnormal increase in application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, and Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-. These advantageous disciplines closely correspond to the majors recruited in Shanxi, such as Electronic Information, Automation, Mechanical Engineering, and Weaponry, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently in a 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' status from 2024 to 2026, with stable popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight decline in the examinee pool, easing competition slightly. Regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 Shanxi Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 419 points, a decrease from the previous science first batch line, but this is a normal adjustment due to the switch to the new Gaokao model. Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Shanxi examinees. The proportion of students recruited in Shanxi to the total national recruitment is about 4.7% (2025 data), which is moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in the 2025 ranking as a baseline, the momentum for forward shift due to the 13.1% enrollment reduction in 2026, the slight improvement in university ranking and the appeal of advantageous disciplines, as well as the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to move forward from the 2025 baseline of 5001. However, the relatively large enrollment reduction limits the forward shift space, and the sustained high popularity of majors supports the ranking. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 4629, with a range of 4129–5129.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)

- Computer Science
- Applied Physics (Semiconductor Huang Kun Experimental Class)
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Weaponry (Intelligent Unmanned Systems Direction)
- Mechanical Engineering (Intelligent Design and Manufacturing Direction)
- Aerospace Engineering
- Special Energy Technology and Engineering (Zeshan Special Energy Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials Science (Aerospace Materials Engineering/Semiconductor AI Chip/Smart Energy Storage Device Experimental Class)
- Engineering Mechanics (Aerospace Experimental Class)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Elite Experimental Class)
- Big Data Management and Application (Digital Intelligence Decision Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 4629, range 4129–5129. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (5129), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings near the lower limit (4129), you can focus on Tier 1 majors such as Electronic Information and Computer Science. NUST is characterized by weaponry and chemical engineering, but popular majors like Electronic Information and Computer Science are highly competitive. It is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation levels for a reasonable mix.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京理工大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜排名第 36 名，属全国顶尖理工类高校，层次稳固；该校声誉评价近年以中性/混合为主，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第 65，评价为"一般"，未出现报考关注度异常信号；该校文科招生专业（社会工作、英语、语言学、马克思主义理论、法学、数字公共治理）与学校 A 类学科（化工、光学、控制、机械）无直接对应，但马克思主义理论学科可参考学校思政教育底蕴。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科类专业社会热度整体平稳，法学专业热度偏热，语言类专业热度一般观望；山西省 2026 年历史类考生约 63113 人，较 2025 年 84879 人减少约 25.6%，考生规模大幅下降，竞争显著缓解；省控线方面，2025 年山西历史类本科批 443 分，较此前文科一批线有所下降，属新高考模式切换的正常调整；南京理工大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对山西文科考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在山西文科招生人数较少，2026 年扩招后增至 26 人，占比仍较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次前移至 2329 名的基准、2026 年大幅扩招 116.7% 带来的位次后移压力，以及历史类考生总数大幅下降 25.6% 对竞争的缓解作用，两者对冲后扩招影响更为显著。预测最低位次约 3929 名，区间 3429–4429 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the lowest rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 2085→2103→3941→2329. In 2022–2023, it stabilized around 2100, but in 2024 it significantly dropped to 3941 (a drop of about 1838 places). In 2025, the first year of the new college entrance exam (history category), it moved forward to 2329 (an advance of about 1612 places), showing drastic fluctuations. Over the past three years (2023–2025), the ranking moved from 2103 to 2329, a cumulative backward shift of about 226 places. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (including history category) in Shanxi Province: 2022: 11 students → 2023: 18 students → 2024: 15 students → 2025: 12 students → 2026: 26 students. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a significant expansion of 14 students (+116.7%), which theoretically intensifies competition and puts strong downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 36th on the Soft Science main ranking, making it a top-tier science and engineering university in China with a solid standing. Its reputation evaluation in recent years has been mainly neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 65th, rated as 'average', with no abnormal signals in application attention. The university's liberal arts majors (Social Work, English, Linguistics, Marxist Theory, Law, Digital Public Governance) do not directly correspond to its A-class disciplines (Chemical Engineering, Optics, Control, Mechanical Engineering), but the Marxist Theory major can draw on the university's ideological and political education foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of liberal arts majors is stable, with Law being relatively hot and language majors generally lukewarm. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 63,113, a decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly reducing competition. Regarding the provincial control line, in 2025, the Shanxi history category undergraduate batch line was 443 points, a decrease from the previous liberal arts first batch line, which is a normal adjustment during the transition to the new college entrance exam model. Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Shanxi liberal arts examinees. The university's enrollment of liberal arts students in Shanxi is small, and after the 2026 expansion, it increases to 26 students, still a small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the 2025 ranking moving forward to 2329, the downward pressure from the 116.7% expansion in 2026, and the mitigating effect of a 25.6% decrease in history category examinees, the expansion impact is more significant after offsetting. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 3929, with a range of 3429–4429.

- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Digital Public Governance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3929, with a range of 3429–4429. For rankings near the upper limit (4429), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Linguistics and Digital Public Governance, with Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings near the lower limit (3429), one can aim for Tier 1 majors like Marxist Theory or Law. Nanjing University of Science and Technology has few liberal arts majors, but in 2026, it added Law and Digital Public Governance, broadening the options.
